ndra (Moon), there will be
changes. Chandra (Moon) is known for motion movement. So,
in a Chart, if Saturn (Sani) transits over the natal Moon
(Chandra), the native will have a, change of place. This
combination also creates the accusations. saturn (Sani) -Karma/
deed, Chandra (Moon) -Movement, when this situation occurs
Saturn's fault will not be there.
If Saturn (Sani) is having conjunction with egoistic Mars
(Kuja), the Lord ofProfession I Karma, Karma will also be
having egoistic nature. if egoism comes to the profession or if
profession attains the egoism, the profession will not be
complete. This is experimental.
The significator of austerity - ketu does not cooperate
with the significator or profession, the Saturn (Sani). That means
to the profession, to a person doing a job, if an ascetic comes
& tells to do the job, the worker will not agree and refuses to
do. The reason being the when Saturn has combination with
Ketu, Ketu will not allow to do the job i.e.
